content: Just as the linguistic concept of reflexion (reflection) taught in high school English writing requires learners to revisit their own drafted arguments to correct logical gaps and clarify meaning, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can draw on structured writing reflection pedagogy to design better step-by-step self-critique frameworks for autonomous agents. This frames existing LLM self-reflection not as a novel AI innovation, but as a formalization of the same reflective writing process humans have used for centuries to improve expressive and logical output.
